message:
feat(ondisk): parse and serialize block/inode bitmap checksums in group descriptors

Add block_bitmap_csum and inode_bitmap_csum fields to Ext4GroupDesc,
reading the CRC32C values from their split lo/hi locations in the
on-disk group descriptor (offsets 0x18/0x1A for 32-byte descriptors,
with hi halves at 0x38/0x3A for 64-byte descriptors). Wire the new
fields through both parse() and serialize() paths so round-tripping
preserves bitmap integrity metadata.

This enables future bitmap verification and repair operations that
need to validate or recompute bitmap checksums against the stored
CRC32C values in the group descriptor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
